author: jonny.derp
content:
I ran a benchmark that compared marshalling vs unmarshalling an ExecutionPayloadEnvelop with 72 blobs and unmarshalling was definitely slow:

`blobs=72: marshal 7.49ms , unmarshal  46.16ms`

I imagine a similar trick would need to be used to speed up the unmarshalling or upgrade to Go 1.26 and use json/v2
